notes: Authoring checklist/schema for future captured-building and supply-pile candidates.
This file defines metadata expected by future authoring tools, but it does not define real AP locations.
Catalog entries must remain disabled from production slot data until runtime completion and persistence support exists.

authoringChecklist: Candidate is capturable by player faction in real mission flow.
Candidate is not destroyed or made unreachable by normal scripting before player can interact.
Candidate can be detected in runtime completion code without fragile object-name guessing.
Candidate has clear visual/map identity for future authoring UI.
Candidate has missability risk reviewed before becoming an AP location.
Pile belongs to a real collectible supply source and is not scripted-only decoration.
Pile depletion can be persisted across mission reset/replay.
Thresholds are monotonic and each produces a one-shot AP check.
Near-start piles are marked for sphere-zero review.
Candidate has clear visual/map identity for future authoring UI.

visualAuthoringMetadata.icon: Future UI icon key or asset reference.
visualAuthoringMetadata.mapMarker: Future map-editor marker style such as safe, economy, contested, or risky.
visualAuthoringMetadata.screenshotRef: Optional screenshot or cropped map image reference for visual review.
visualAuthoringMetadata.mapObjectId: Optional map object identifier if extracted by tooling.
visualAuthoringMetadata.designerNote: Short human note explaining why this candidate is fair.
